scenario_results.notes: Personal and organization artifacts, evidence, memory, and answers stay in the active owner-scoped namespace unless explicitly promoted.
Classification policy covers read/search/summarize/memory extraction/action-use verbs with allow and deny outcomes plus audit refs.
Claim basis export includes source artifacts, search snapshot, evidence bundle, transformations, owner approval, and freshness state.
Read-only source ingestion records zero source writeback events and requires Workflow/Action for mutation.
Namespace promotion modes expose distinct ownership, materialization, permission, provenance, evidence, and audit behavior.
Organization policy matrix governs organization users across read, write, promote, approve, execute, Autopilot configuration, Agent Pack installation, and learning aggregation.
Personal claim and memory stay personal by default and cross-namespace use requires explicit promotion records.
Product learning can use explicit/benchmark/opt-in/redacted inputs but records denied raw user/org truth reads and zero memory rewrites.
Tenant B cannot search, read, answer from, or infer Tenant A organization artifacts/memory.
Namespace audit export includes data access, memory writes, promotions, approvals, actions, model routing, agent activity, and learning events.
Workspace deletion/retention dry-run explains delete, disable, audit retention, immutable evidence retention, anonymization, and policy constraints.
Mis-promotion recovery revokes future use, records rollback details, access trail, and retained audit/evidence constraints.
Organization context is not used in personal answers without explicit permission or reference.
Product-learning signals remain proposal/evaluation data and do not rewrite user or organization memory.

roles.purpose: Own mission planning, delegation, synthesis, authority gaps, and after-action review.
Review artifacts, search snapshots, and evidence bundles without mutating truth.
Draft memory candidates from evidence while leaving approval to governed memory paths.
Prepare Workflow/Action proposals, dry-runs, and rollback-aware execution plans.
Evaluate ambiguous outputs as a supporting signal without mutating memory or rules.
Request ConnectorHub-mediated capabilities and never hold credentials or provider clients.
Evaluate scope, risk, approval, egress, and authority boundaries.
Suggest reusable playbooks from approved experience without auto-globalizing behavior.

policy_checks.reason: Product learning cannot silently consume personal truth.
Product learning cannot silently consume organization truth.
Explicit feedback is allowed as proposal/evaluation data.
Approved redacted data can be used without rewriting user/org truth.

states.anonymized: Aggregated product-learning signals use redaction/anonymization and never raw user/org truth by default.
states.deleted: User-visible active record is removed or disabled when policy allows.
states.disabled: Automation and search use stop for disabled resources.
states.retained_as_immutable_evidence: Original artifacts may remain immutable when referenced by evidence or legal/audit policy.
states.retained_for_audit: Audit ledger entries remain tamper-evident for accountability.
states.subject_to_policy: Retention/legal hold/admin policy can constrain deletion.
